# Villa Jaia — Can Jaia

> A private luxury finca in Sant Agustí des Vedrà, southwest Ibiza, Spain. Also known as Can Jaia ("Can" is the Ibicenco/Catalan word for "house of"). 5 suites sleeping up to 10 guests. Private pool, 22,000 m² organic garden, solar-powered, own water well, independent guest house. Contact for rates and availability.

## The Property
- Full name: Villa Jaia / Can Jaia
- 5 suites total: 4 in the main house + 1 independent guest annex (2 bedrooms, separate entrance)
- Sleeps 10 guests · 8 bathrooms
- Private pool in fully fenced garden with sun loungers and chill-out zones
- 22,000 m² organic garden with lemon, fig, olive trees, bougainvillea, lavender
- Free-range chickens that lay fresh eggs daily
- Solar-powered · own water well · completely self-sufficient
- Fireplace in living room · air conditioning throughout
- Fully equipped kitchen · outdoor dining area with BBQ
- WiFi & Smart TV · gated private driveway

## Location
- Address: Can Jaia, Sant Agustí des Vedrà, 07829 Ibiza, Spain
- Zone: Southwest Ibiza (Sant Josep de sa Talaia municipality)
- 10 min: Cala Bassa · Cala Tarida · San José village
- 15 min: Es Vedrà viewpoint (famous Mediterranean sunset spot)
- 20 min: Ibiza Town (Dalt Vila — UNESCO World Heritage)
- 25 min: Las Salinas beach & nature reserve · Ibiza Airport
- 40 min: Formentera (by ferry from La Savina)

## Availability 2026
- April: mostly booked
- May: available (small gap booked 21–23)
- June: on hold 6–25, booked 28–30
- July: fully booked
- August: booked 1–14, available from 15
- September–October: fully available

## Booking
- No prices listed publicly — contact for rates
- Book direct via WhatsApp: +34 637 472 828
- Website: https://www.villajaia.com
- Enquiry form: https://www.villajaia.com/#book
- Check-in: 16:00 (flexible) · Check-out: 10:00 (flexible)
- Security deposit: €4,500
- Minimum stay: 4 nights (July–August: 1 week minimum)

- English: https://www.villajaia.com/
- Italian: https://www.villajaia.com/it/
- French: https://www.villajaia.com/fr/

- Spanish: https://www.villajaia.com/es/
